order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 in many configurations and does not support Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces required by Spring Boot 3; upgrading is necessary to run on the target JDK with modern Spring features.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21; keeping it at 17 would result in incorrect bytecode generation or build failures if the toolchain is enforced.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy SpringDoc OpenAPI UI dependency with the Spring Boot 3 compatible starter artifact.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'springdoc-openapi-ui' (v1.x) relies on javax.servlet and is incompatible with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta EE 9+ namespace; using it causes compile errors or runtime linkage failures.

payment-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
payment-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 in many configurations and does not support Spring Framework 6, which is required for native Java 21 features and modern security standards.

payment-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
payment-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must explicitly target Java 21 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded Spring Boot 3.x stack.

payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for PostConstruct from the legacy javax.annotation package to the Jakarta EE namespace.
payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed in Java 21 (and Spring Boot 3), causing a compilation error 'package javax.annotation does not exist' if not updated to jakarta.annotation.

payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 21 to ensure the project compiles against the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this property, the project would continue to compile against the previous default Java version (likely 17), failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if the target environment is strictly Java 21.

stock-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
stock-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 in many configurations and does not support Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces required by Spring Boot 3; keeping 2.6.2 would cause runtime failures or missing dependencies when combined with other Spring Boot 3 migrations.

stock-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
stock-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build would target Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing mismatches if the runtime environment enforces Java 21.

stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for PostConstruct from the Java EE package to the Jakarta EE package.
stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, and potentially compile errors if the old API jar is not on the classpath.
